conditions.notes: Employee must request extension in writing before approved leave expires.
conditions.source_text: the employee must request it in writing from her/his supervisor prior to the leave expiration

conditions.notes: Request to substitute sick leave for annual leave must be made within 2 weeks of return to duty.
conditions.source_text: A request for substitution of sick leave for annual leave must be made to the agency within two (2) weeks after the employee has returned to duty.
